name: Field Crew SAP Asset Management Write
description: Field Crew can create and update work orders, record time, and report material usage in SAP AM.

name: Asset Engineer SAP Asset Management Admin
description: Asset Engineers have full administration access to SAP AM including asset master data and maintenance plans.

name: Network Controller ADMS Admin
description: Network Controllers have full control of ADMS for real-time monitoring, switching, and outage management.

name: Customer Service Rep Dynamics 365 CRM Write
description: CSRs can create and update customer accounts, premises, and service requests in CRM.

name: Customer Service Rep SAP Finance Read
description: CSRs can view customer billing details and payment history in SAP Finance.

name: Finance Analyst SAP Finance Admin
description: Finance Analysts have full administration of SAP Finance including ledger, AP, AR, and reporting.

name: Finance Analyst Dynamics 365 CRM Read
description: Finance Analysts can view customer account and billing data in CRM for reconciliation.

name: HR Coordinator SAP Human Resources Admin
description: HR Coordinators have full administration of SAP HR including employee records and payroll.

name: Warehouse Operator Dynamics 365 WMS Write
description: Warehouse Operators can record receipts, issues, transfers, and inventory counts in WMS.

name: Warehouse Operator SAP Asset Management Read
description: Warehouse Operators can view work orders to plan material picks in SAP AM.

name: IT Administrator Azure Full Access
description: IT Administrators have full control of Azure Integration Bus and related Azure resources.

name: Executive Leadership SAP Finance Read
description: Executive Leadership can view financial reports and dashboards in SAP Finance.

name: Executive Leadership ADMS Read
description: Executive Leadership can view ADMS dashboards for network performance and outage KPIs.

name: Asset Engineer Azure Data Lake Read
description: Asset Engineers can query asset analytics data in Azure Data Lake.

name: Field Crew Azure Data Lake Read
description: Field Crew can view historical outage and asset data in Azure Data Lake.
